g.text: Admin opens "Generate Dataset" tab — enters Student ID, clicks START
Sets resolution 1280×720 · fallback tries alt index + CAP_DSHOW
60 photos · 6 pose phases · cropped & resized to 200×200 px

svg.text: Train Classifier runs between these two steps (train_classifier.py)

g.text: Admin opens "Face Recognition" tab — camera selector shown
camera_cap.read() ← CAMERA READS HERE · HaarCascade detects face
ROI extracted → enhance_face() → predict returns (label, confidence)
label_map.json maps numeric label back to student_id
Name + timestamp saved · present_student_ids prevents duplicates
